/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/main_qt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_ArchiveFormat.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Bundle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Common.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Extended_Bundle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Extended_Types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Sanity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Types.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/AppShell_Unbundle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/Encryption/Crypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/Encryption/EncryptionLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/Encryption/LayeredCrypt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/IO/FileSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/PeanutButterUltima.dir/src/IO/LocalFileSystem.cpp.o -o PeanutButterUltima.app/Contents/MacOS/PeanutButterUltima -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
